CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE test_data2 (id INTEGER, group_id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
SELECT group_id, stddev(value) FROM test_data2 GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT a.id, stddev(b.value) FROM test_data AS a JOIN test_data2 AS b ON a.id = b.id GROUP BY a.id;
CREATE TABLE nested_data (category VARCHAR, value FLOAT);
SELECT category, stddev(value) FROM (SELECT * FROM nested_data WHERE value > 150) AS filtered GROUP BY category;
SELECT COUNT(*), stddev(value) FROM test_data2 WHERE value < 45;
SELECT stddev(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data2 WHERE group_id = 1));
WITH grouped_data AS (SELECT group_id, stddev(value) AS std FROM test_data2 GROUP BY group_id) SELECT * FROM grouped_data WHERE std > 10;
